mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO index_weight (ts_code, trade_date, con_code, weight) VALUES
(#{item.tsCode}, #{item.tradeDate}, #{item.conCode}, #{item.weight})
mapper.select: SELECT ts_code AS tsCode, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM index_weight WHERE trade_date = #{tradeDate} GROUP BY ts_code
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT ts_code, SUM(weight) AS weight_sum FROM index_weight WHERE trade_date = #{tradeDate} GROUP BY ts_code ) t WHERE weight_sum < 99 OR weight_sum > 101
